rollback_commands: npm --prefix frontend ci && npm --prefix frontend audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix frontend run build
rollback_steps: Revert the Phase 6 squash commit through the protected-main PR path; replace <PHASE_06_SQUASH_SHA> with the resulting merge SHA recorded at release time.
Delete generated ZIP and receipt artifacts with the recorded rm command; generated exports are reproducible and contain no source-of-truth data.
Run the recorded Python and frontend verification commands after the revert.
If a production rollback is needed, promote baseline deployment dpl_HDRUkMbW5rKaaJYBgNwbePvq6GHi only after rechecking / and /create.
Upstream/imported source cards remain untouched. No production database or user data rollback is required.
